Use the Activity book to practise and reinforce what you learned in the Student’s book. 3 Student’s Book You will have three unit reviews that will help you assess what you have learned! Review Units 1-3 3 Activity Book English 3rd grade It's review time! 1 Play with a classmate. English 3rd grade Student A Get ready with English • English • 3rd grade Brendan Dunne - Robin Newton 1. What's this? Brendan Dunne - Robin Newton 2. What time is it? 3. What day comes next? Monday, Tuesday, ? . 4. Where's the cat? ? 5. Complete the sentence: I at 7 o'clock. 6. Is he tall? Student B Student’s Book • 1. Where is the plant? 2. What day comes next? Thursday, Friday, ? . 3. What time is it? 4. What's this? ? 5. Complete the sentence: I at half past 8. 6. Is he strong?
